title: Guideline for the Diagnosis and Management of Chronic Coronary Disease
content: Key recommendations: (1) Lifestyle modification including heart-healthy diet, regular physical activity (150 min/week moderate), and smoking cessation. (2) Antiplatelet therapy: aspirin 75-100mg daily for all patients with CAD unless contraindicated. (3) High-intensity statin therapy targeting LDL-C <70 mg/dL. (4) Beta-blockers after MI or with reduced LVEF. (5) ACE inhibitors/ARBs for patients with LV dysfunction, diabetes, or hypertension. (6) Revascularization (PCI/CABG) for significant ischemia or anatomy not controlled by GDMT.
reference: Virani SS et al. J Am Coll Cardiol. 2023;82(9):833-955. DOI:10.1016/j.jacc.2023.04.003
